data.title: 国际服卡池「Let's go! Let's go! Kotori's about to start the show! Clap your hands and look right here! Get ready to do a marvelous cheer!」
data.summary: [Pick-Up Recruitment Preview] A New Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 3/12 (Tue)! Pick-Up Student: 3
data.body:
[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A New Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 3/12 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Kotori (Cheer Squad)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule:
3/12 (Tue) After Maintenance – 3/21 (Thu) 1:59 AM (UTC)
